summary: First-run complete testing of CrewBook app - all critical flows working. 16/16 backend tests pass. All frontend pages load correctly with proper navigation.

minor.issue: Frontend form label says 'City' but backend field name is 'location' - this is only a label inconsistency, mapping works correctly internally

issues: Field labeled 'City' sends data as 'location' to backend - minor label mismatch but functionally correct

critical_code_review_comments: Register form inputs don't have 'name' attributes - only data-testid used for identification (works but less standard)
Admin credentials (admin@crewbook.in / Admin@123) shown in plaintext on login form - security concern for production

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load, registration, login, navigation working)

seed_data_creation: Registered test users via /api/auth/register during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows tested and working. Backend 16/16 tests pass. Landing page, auth (login/register), dashboard, admin dashboard, search, connections, gigs, wallet, notifications, calendar pages all load. Admin: admin@crewbook.in / Admin@123. New user registration redirects to dashboard with verification banner. WhatsApp notifications are MOCKED.
